历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5656 → 3663 → 2238 → 1578 → 2554, showing an overall forward trend (cumulative forward shift of about 4078 places from 2021 to 2024), but in 2025 it shifted backward by about 976 places compared to 2024, indicating a significant rebound; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2554; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province was 109 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and 94 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 117, an increase of about 24.5% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked a stable 10th (Top 10) in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities with extremely high educational strength and comprehensive reputation; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues), in 2024 slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors), but both were local incidents and did not form a systematic psychological impact on applications; Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.84 million, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting high attention from examinees; has 13 A- or above disciplines, among which Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering are A+, Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Mathematics, etc. are A, with engineering strength ranking top nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, etc., are all highly recommended with increasing popularity; the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,817), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 145,654 based on historical proportions, indicating significantly intensified competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, geographically adjacent to Gansu, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 1.2% (2025), which is a medium-to-low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, but the absolute number of planned places is relatively large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering three factors: the ranking rebound to 2554 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of about 24.5% in 2026, and the increase in the number of local examinees by about 21.6%: the expansion and examinee growth basically offset each other, but the university's top-tier level and high-demand engineering majors continue to attract high-scoring examinees, with the ranking expected; predicted minimum ranking about 2899, range 2551–3247.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 383 → 329 → 289 → 285 → 354, showing an overall upward trend (cumulative improvement of about 98 places from 2021 to 2024), but in 2025 it dropped by about 69 places compared to 2024, indicating a rebound; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 354; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for liberal arts/history category was 7 students in 2021, 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 students, a reduction of 20% compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked stable 10th (Top 10) in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide; although liberal arts are not the core strength of this university, the overall brand effect is significant; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues), in 2024 slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics), both local incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.84 million, reflecting high overall attention, but limited attention to liberal arts majors; Xi'an Jiaotong University's liberal arts discipline evaluation: Marxist Theory A, Law not separately rated, Foreign Languages and Literatures not separately rated; liberal arts strength is relatively weaker compared to engineering, but Law Experimental Class, Liberal Arts Experimental Class, etc., still attract students relying on the university's brand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Foreign Languages and Literatures generally wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Gansu Province is estimated to be about 73,046 based on historical proportion, an increase of about 25.1% compared to 2025 (58,374), significantly intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, geographically adjacent to Gansu, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment plan for history category in Gansu Province is small (12 students), belonging to small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the ranking rebound to 354 in 2025, a 20% enrollment reduction in 2026, and a 25.1% increase in history category examinees in the province: the dual superposition of enrollment reduction and examinee growth intensifies competition, but the examinee growth further pushes up competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 327, with a range of 277–377.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西安交通大学医学类在甘肃省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为：2021年5656名（计划41人）、2022年2223名（计划32人）、2023年2238名（计划33人）、2024年1578名（计划30 人）、2025年2554名（计划31人）。五年间位次波动较大，2021年位次最高（最易进），随后2022-2024年持续上升（变难进），2025年大幅回落至2554名。2026年医学类招生计 划为34人，较2025年的31人扩招3人，扩幅约9.68%，供给增加对位次产生下移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力雄厚。其医学部历史悠久，临床医学等专业在西北地区乃至全国享有较高 声誉，对甘肃考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度整体较高，临床医学（5+3一体化、侯宗濂班）等高端培养项目尤其受高分考生青睐。甘肃省医学类招生规模相对有限，西安交通大学作为外省985高 校，其医学类在甘肃的竞争态势受本省考生对医学专业偏好、以及同层次院校医学类招生计划变化等多重因素影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，预测2026年西安交通大学医学类在甘肃省最低录取位次约为2732名，较2025年的2554名略有下降（位次数字增大，表示相对更易 进），主要受扩招3人及2025年位次已大幅回落的延续效应影响。预计录取区间为2513至2951名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Gansu Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 5656th (planned 41 students), 2022: 2223rd (planned 32 students), 2023: 2238th (planned 33 students), 2024: 1578th (planned 30 students), 2025: 2554th (planned 31 students). Rankings fluctuated significantly over the five years, with the highest (easiest to enter) in 2021, followed by a continuous rise (harder to enter) from 2022 to 2024, and a sharp drop to 2554th in 2025. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 34 students, an increase of 3 students (about 9.68%) compared to 2025's 31 students, which puts downward pressure on rankings due to increased supply.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical school has a long history, and specialties such as clinical medicine enjoy high reputation in the northwest region and even nationwide, maintaining sustained appeal for Gansu candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Regional Factors
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the overall popularity of medical majors has been high, with high-end training programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program, Hou Zonglian Class) particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. The scale of medical enrollment in Gansu Province is relatively limited. As an out-of-province 985 university, the competition for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Gansu is influenced by multiple factors, including local candidates' preference for medical majors and changes in enrollment plans for medical programs at similar-level institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Gansu Province in 2026 will be approximately 2732nd, slightly lower than the 2025 ranking of 2554th (a larger ranking number indicates relatively easier admission), mainly due to the expansion of 3 students and the continuation effect of the sharp drop in 2025 rankings. The expected admission range is between 2513th and 2951st.

- Clinical Medicine (Hou Zonglian Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Medical Experimental Class (Pharmacy Category) (Pharmacy, Clinical Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Clinical Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Nursing
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
